title: Lasaviin Fashion Leather Dog & Cat Carrier, Airline Approved, Collapsible Soft Sided Travel Puppy Carrier, White, Under 15Lbs, Small Dogs & Cats, Shopping, Travel, Vet Visits
features: 【Fashionable and Comfortable】The new fashionable dog carrier is simple and elegant, perfect for small pets daily traveling needs. Whether you are shopping, driving, traveling by plane or going to the vet, it provides a comfortable, spacious travel experience for your pet.

【High Quality】Our cat carrier purse is made of high quality vegan leather. Soft, lightweight, colorfast, non-deformable and can withstand daily wear and tear. Easily meet the needs of shopping, walking, traveling, outdoor activities and other travel needs.

【Suitable for Small Pets】Length, width, and height: 17.3"* 11" * 11.4 ", suitable for small pets under 15 pounds, such as puppies（Chihuahua, Toy Poodle, Teacup, Yorkie, Mini Dachshund, Pomeranian, Bichon Frise, etc, Cats, Rabbits, etc. Please measure the length of the pet before purchase to avoid trouble.

【Airline Approval】This TSA-Approved pet carrier meets most airline requirements for a relaxing, comfortable trip with your pet. Please confirm the latest regulations on carrying pets with the airline before traveling to avoid delaying the itinerary.

【After-Sale Service】Stylish, comfortable and breathable, I believe this tote bag must be the best choice for you to travel with your small pet. Please contact us if you have any questions, happy to serve you at any time.
description: From the brand Previous page Lasaviin is committed to providing high quality products for every consumer! Our design philosophy is "Fashionable, Practical, Confident", and each bag is made of high quality materials and craftsmanship. We also focus on innovation and the pursuit of high quality products, and are determined to become a globally recognized and innovative brand. Next page
